hero.title: Build websites
hero.subtitle: Describe your website in plain language, CreateIt generates it instantly. Professional design, responsive, ready to use.
hero.promptExample: A portfolio site for a photographer with a dark and elegant gallery

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Powerful tools to create, edit and deploy your websites in an instant.

items.title: Advanced AI
items.description: Claude AI generates professional websites from a simple text description.

items.title: Visual Editor
items.description: Edit text and images directly on your site with our WYSIWYG editor.

items.title: ZIP Export
items.description: Download your site in one click, ready to be hosted anywhere.

items.title: 21st.dev Templates
items.description: Import premium UI components from the 21st.dev library.

items.title: Bilingual FR/EN
items.description: Interface and generation available in French and English.

items.title: Full history
items.description: Find and edit all your created sites from your dashboard.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to go from idea to website.

steps.title: Describe your site
steps.description: Write a description of your ideal website in natural language.

steps.title: AI generates
steps.description: Claude analyzes your description and creates a complete, professional website.

steps.title: Edit and export
steps.description: Customize your site then download it or share it directly.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
